item.description:
Jarvis 0.5.0

  • Jarvis is now signed and notarized by Apple — installing is just download, drag to Applications, and double-click. No Terminal, no "Open Anyway", no security dialogs.
  • Jarvis keeps itself up to date: it checks for new versions automatically and offers them with one click (or use the Jarvis menu → Check for Updates…).
  • Upgrading from an older build? Trash the old copy first, then grant Screen Recording & Accessibility once more — macOS sees the new Apple signature as a fresh app. This is a one-time step; future updates keep your permissions.
